nasb.text: As they were going down to the edge of the city, Samuel said to Saul, “Say to the servant that he might go ahead of us and pass on, but you remain standing now, that I may proclaim the word of God to you.”

esv.text: As they were going down to the outskirts of the city, Samuel said to Saul, “Tell the servant to pass on before us, and when he has passed on, stop here yourself for a while, that I may make known to you the word of God.”

cnv.text: 他們下到城邊的時候，撒母耳對掃羅說：“吩咐你的僕人先走。你暫且留在這裡，我好把　神的話講給你聽。”

ccb.text: 他们来到城边的时候，撒母耳让扫罗吩咐仆人先走。仆人离去后，他对扫罗说：“你在这里留一会儿，我要把上帝的话告诉你。”
